---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and in what scenario?

## Proposed solution

How should it work? Include any relevant config parameters, CLI changes, or behaviour changes.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you evaluated and why you ruled them out.

## Additional context

Cluster topology, scale, or other constraints that are relevant to the design.
